raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-observation and commitment to metacognitive differentiation between subjective cognition and evidence",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "automatic thoughts can diverge from evidence",
    "the speaker possesses the capacity to notice this divergence in real time",
    "such noticing constitutes a meaningful behavioral or epistemic shift"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; restates a standard distinction between phenomenal experience and epistemic warrant without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the distinction is used to prompt evidence-checking before acting on automatic thoughts and the resulting behavior change aligns with the speaker's goals",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as license to dismiss all automatic thoughts as false or to equate 'evidence' solely with external data that conveniently supports preferred conclusions"
}
